H

hashCode() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data.Student
hashcode for student objects
HashSet<E> - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.set
The HashSet is implemented as a linear probing hash table data structure to support efficient set abstract data type behaviors.
HashSet() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.set.HashSet
Constructs a new HashSet
HashSet(boolean) - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.set.HashSet
Constructs a new HashSet to be used ONLY when testing the data structure
HashSetTest - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.set
Test class for HashSet Checks the expected outputs of the Set abstract data type behaviors when using a hash table data structure
HashSetTest() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.set.HashSetTest
 
HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue<K,V> - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue
A HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue is an array-based min-heap implementation of the AdaptablePriorityQueue abstract data type.
HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue.HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue
Constructs a new HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue using the natural ordering of keys
HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue(Comparator<K>) - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue.HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue
Constructs a new HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue using a custom comparator
HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue.AdaptablePQEntry<K,V> - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue
An AdaptablePQEntry extends AbstractPriorityQueue.PQEntry to maintain a reference of the entry's current index within the array-based heap data structure.
HeapAdaptablePriorityQueueTest - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue
Test class for HeapAdaptablePriorityQueue Checks the expected outputs of the Adaptable Priorty Queue abstract data type behaviors when using a min-heap data structure
HeapAdaptablePriorityQueueTest() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue.HeapAdaptablePriorityQueueTest
 
HeapPriorityQueue<K,V> - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue
A HeapPriorityQueue is an array-based min-heap implementation of the PriorityQueue abstract data type.
HeapPriorityQueue() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue.HeapPriorityQueue
Constructs a new HeapPriorityQueue that compares keys (priorities) using the natural ordering of the key type
HeapPriorityQueue(Comparator<K>) - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue.HeapPriorityQueue
Constructs a new HeapPriorityQueue using a custom comparator
HeapPriorityQueueTest - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue
Test class for HeapPriorityQueue Checks the expected outputs of the Priorty Queue abstract data type behaviors when using a min-heap data structure
HeapPriorityQueueTest() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.priority_queue.HeapPriorityQueueTest
